mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(dr.value_actual), 0), 2) FROM daily_report dr INNER JOIN inverter i ON dr.inverter_id = i.id INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{plantId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND dr.base_date = #{selectedDate}

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(dr.value_expected), 0), 2) FROM daily_report dr INNER JOIN inverter i ON dr.inverter_id = i.id INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{plantId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND dr.base_date = #{selectedDate}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(hr.base_time, '%H시') AS label, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(hr.value_actual), 0), 2) AS value FROM hourly_report hr INNER JOIN inverter i ON hr.inverter_id = i.id INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{plantId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(hr.base_time) = #{selectedDate} GROUP BY HOUR(hr.base_time), DATE_FORMAT(hr.base_time, '%H시') ORDER BY HOUR(hr.base_time)

SELECT CASE wc.weather_code WHEN 1 THEN '맑음' WHEN 2 THEN '구름' WHEN 3 THEN '흐림' WHEN 4 THEN '비' WHEN 5 THEN '눈' END AS label, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(g.performance_ratio), 0), 2) AS value FROM ( SELECT 1 AS weather_code UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 ) wc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT gl.weather_code, gl.performance_ratio FROM generation_log gl INNER JOIN inverter i ON gl.inverter_id = i.id INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{plantId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(gl.base_time) = #{selectedDate} AND gl.weather_code IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) ) g ON wc.weather_code = g.weather_code GROUP BY wc.weather_code ORDER BY wc.weather_code

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(dr.value_actual), 0), 2) FROM daily_report dr INNER JOIN inverter i ON dr.inverter_id = i.id INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{plantId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND dr.base_date = DATE_SUB(#{selectedDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(dr.value_actual), 0), 2) FROM daily_report dr INNER JOIN inverter i ON dr.inverter_id = i.id INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{plantId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND dr.base_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{selectedDate}, INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND #{selectedDate}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dr.stopped_time), 0) FROM daily_report dr INNER JOIN inverter i ON dr.inverter_id = i.id INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{plantId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND dr.base_date = #{selectedDate}
